xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '' and (count(sizes/size) = 1) or (count(sizes/size[@available = 'in_stock' or @available = 'on_order']) > 1)]

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!=''
$cat_id = '6525' or $cat_id = '6537' or $cat_id = '6539' or $cat_id = '6555' or $cat_id = '6557' or $cat_id = '6558' or $cat_id = '6561' or $cat_id = '6565'

$cat_id = '4494' or $cat_id = '5962' or $cat_id = '5963' or $cat_id = '5964' or $cat_id = '5965' or $cat_id = '5966' or $cat_id = '5967' or $cat_id = '5968' or $cat_id = '5969' or $cat_id = '5970' or $cat_id = '5971' or $cat_id = '5972' or $cat_id = '5973' or $cat_id = '5974'
